description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and extensive use of wood paneling on its exterior. Large, floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the front and rear facades, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoors. The property includes a detached garage with a driveway, surrounded by several mature trees and landscaped greenery. The roof features multiple skylights and rooftop structures, possibly for ventilation or access. The main entrance is accessible via a paved walkway, and the house sits on a rectangular plot with a mix of hardscape and softscape elements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roof, large windows, wood paneling, and a detached garage, surrounded by trees and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, garage, and several trees.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard, deck area, and more trees, with the garage visible to the side.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facade with large windows, deck, and detached garage to the right.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the garage, driveway, and the arrangement of rooftop structures and trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small steps, and a paved walkway, no porch or columns, minimalistic modern style
